summary: Avalonia-specific ReactiveUI guidance with its own startup model and assembly view registration conventions.
recommendedPatterns: Register reactive views from the entry assembly where appropriate.
Use AvaloniaScheduler as the UI scheduler.
avoidPatterns: Do not blindly force the generic RxAppBuilder startup story onto Avalonia.
Do not assume WPF-specific view primitives.
setupSteps: Use Avalonia reactive view base types and view registration helpers.
commonPitfalls: Mixing Avalonia startup guidance with other XAML platforms.
Incorrect scheduler assumptions for Avalonia UI updates.

sources.title: ReactiveUI Avalonia repository
sources.notes: Avalonia-specific startup and view registration guidance.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
